<!-- GENERATED by scripts/build-considerations.mjs — do not edit by hand.
     Source of truth: design-system.json + ai/rules.md. Re-run `npm run build:considerations`. -->

# Story UI — Design System Considerations

This file briefs the AI on the **River Romney design system** so generated
Storybook stories use the real `rr-*` web components and stay on-token. It is
generated from `design-system.json` and `ai/rules.md`.

## How to use these components

- These are **framework-agnostic Lit web components** — author stories as HTML
  custom-element tags (e.g. `<rr-button variant="primary">Save</rr-button>`),
  not React/JSX.
- Register every element with a single **barrel side-effect import** at the top
  of each story file: `import '@riverromney/components';`. Do not deep-import
  individual component files — the package `exports` map only exposes the barrel.
- Style and theme come entirely from CSS custom properties on `:root` (loaded in
  `.storybook/preview.ts` from `build/css/variables.css`). Components inherit the
  base **dark theme** automatically — never set colors on the element.

## Non-negotiable rules

## Hard Rules (never break these)
1. No hardcoded colors — use var(--color-*) custom properties
2. No hardcoded font weights — use var(--font-weight-*) custom properties
3. No font families other than Space Grotesk, Spectral, and JetBrains Mono
4. Display and title tokens use weight 300 (light) — body, label, and code tokens use weight 400 (regular) — label-strong tokens use weight 500 (medium) for emphasis — 600/700 are ad-hoc only via --font-weight-semibold / --font-weight-bold
5. Accent green (foreground.action, foreground.accent, background.action, background.accent) is never resting text or decoration — it signals interactivity or intentional emphasis only
6. All text must meet WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1) against its background — all pairings in the system already do; do not introduce new ones without checking
7. Spacing values must come from the defined scale — do not introduce arbitrary values
8. No hardcoded font sizes — use var(--font-size-*) primitives or semantic font shorthand tokens
9. Never use primitive tokens (color.green.*, space.*, font.size.*) in UI code — always go through the semantic layer

> Generated stories that violate these are rejected by `npm run validate`
> (rules live in `scripts/rules.mjs`). Never emit hex literals, never reference
> `--primitive-*` tokens, and only use spacing/sizes from the token scale.

## Available components (20)

### `<rr-alert>`

Inline notification banner for success, warning, danger, and info messages. Optionally dismissible.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `variant` | 'success' \| 'warning' \| 'danger' \| 'info' | `success` | Visual variant and semantic role. |
| `title` | string | `` | Optional bold title rendered above the body content. |
| `dismissible` | boolean | `false` | When true, renders a dismiss button that hides the alert and fires close. |

**Slots:** (default) — Alert body content.; `icon` — Optional icon in front of the title (use <rr-icon>).

**Events:** `close`

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
- Use alert for form-level or system feedback; for field-level validation use rr-input error-text instead

### `<rr-avatar>`

Circular identity surface showing initials or an image, with size and accent-color variants.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `size` | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl' | `md` | Circle diameter. |
| `color` | 'default' \| 'indigo' \| 'sky' \| 'green' \| 'amber' | `default` | Accent-bold color variant for the initials surface. |
| `name` | string | `` | Full name used to derive up to two initials and the accessible label. |
| `src` | string | `` | Image URL. When set, an img fills the circle instead of initials. |
| `alt` | string | `` | Alt text for the image; falls back to name when omitted. |

**Slots:** (default) — Optional custom content to replace initials (e.g. an icon).

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
- Always provide name (or alt when using src) so the avatar has an accessible label

### `<rr-badge>`

Status badge and accent chip. 9 variants map to component tokens; brand theming cascades via CSS custom properties.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `variant` | 'default' \| 'success' \| 'warning' \| 'danger' \| 'info' \| 'accent-green' \| 'accent-blue' \| 'accent-violet' \| 'accent-amber' | `default` | Visual variant. Status variants (success, warning, danger, info) convey semantic meaning. Accent variants are decorative emphasis tags. |

**Slots:** (default) — Badge label text.

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values. Always use var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
- Variants use a subtle style: a tinted background with accent-colored text, not a solid fill. component-badge-{variant}-foreground is the accent color itself (e.g. foreground-success), not foreground-on-{variant}.
- To make a variant solid instead (bright fill + dark text), repoint its component tokens to background-{variant} and foreground-on-{variant}; consumer code does not change.

### `<rr-button>`

Button with primary/secondary/danger variants, three sizes, loading spinner, and full keyboard/form semantics.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `variant` | string | `primary` | Visual variant: primary (filled CTA), secondary (outlined), danger (destructive). |
| `size` | string | `medium` | Size: small, medium, large. Controls padding and font size. |
| `disabled` | boolean | `false` | Disables the button. Prevents click and removes from tab order. |
| `loading` | boolean | `false` | Shows a spinner and sets aria-busy. Click suppressed while loading. |
| `type` | string | `button` | Button type attribute: button, submit, or reset. |
| `aria-label` | string | — | Accessible label. Required for icon-only buttons. |

**Slots:** `(default)` — Button label text.; `prefix` — Icon or element before the label.; `suffix` — Icon or element after the label.

**Events:** `click`

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values. Always use var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
- Primary button: one per page maximum
- Icon-only buttons must have aria-label

### `<rr-card>`

Surface container on the elevated background tier with optional header, body, and footer slots.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `padding` | 'none' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' | `md` | Internal padding around the body slot. Header and footer padding is fixed. |

**Slots:** `header` — Card heading row (title, actions, avatar). Hidden when empty.; (default) — Card body content.; `footer` — Card footer row (secondary actions, metadata). Hidden when empty.

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
- Use background.alt for surface separation rather than a shadow token

### `<rr-checkbox>`

Form-associated checkbox with checked, indeterminate, and disabled states. Backed by ElementInternals.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `checked` | boolean | `false` | Whether the checkbox is checked. |
| `indeterminate` | boolean | `false` | Mixed state; cleared when the user toggles the checkbox. |
| `disabled` | boolean | `false` | Disables interaction and form participation. |
| `value` | string | `on` | Form value submitted when checked. |
| `name` | string | `` | Form field name. |
| `label` | string | `` | Label text; falls back to slotted content when empty. |

**Slots:** (default) — Label text (alternative to the label property).

**Events:** `change`

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
- Always provide a label (via the label prop or slotted content) so the control is named

### `<rr-dialog>`

Modal dialog built on the native <dialog> element with focus trap and Escape-to-close.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `heading` | string | `` | Dialog title text rendered in the header. |
| `open` | boolean | `false` | Whether the dialog is open. Reflected to an attribute. |
| `close-on-backdrop` | boolean | `true` | Close the dialog when the backdrop is clicked. |

**Slots:** (default) — Dialog body content.; `footer` — Action buttons, displayed in a right-aligned footer row. Footer is hidden when empty.

**Events:** `rr-dialog-close`

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
- Open and close the dialog via the open property or the show()/close() methods — both keep state and the rr-dialog-close event in sync

### `<rr-icon>`

Sized, accessible wrapper for inline SVG icons. Decorative by default; labelled icons become role="img".

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `size` | 'compact' \| 'default' \| 'large' \| 'xl' | `default` | Icon size, mapped to the icon-size design tokens. Reflected to an attribute. |
| `aria-label` | string \| null | `null` | Accessible label. When set, the host gets role="img"; otherwise it is aria-hidden="true" (decorative). |

**Slots:** (default) — The SVG icon element to render.

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
- Icon color is inherited from the parent — set color on the surrounding element, not the icon

### `<rr-input>`

Form-associated text input with label, helper/error text, and ElementInternals for native form participation.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `type` | string | `text` | Input type attribute (text, email, password, etc.). |
| `name` | string | `` | Form field name for submission. |
| `value` | string | `` | Current input value. |
| `placeholder` | string | `` | Placeholder text shown when empty. |
| `label` | string | `` | Visible label text above the input. |
| `helper-text` | string | `` | Helper text below the input. Hidden when error-text is set. |
| `error-text` | string | `` | Error message below the input. Sets aria-invalid and replaces helper text. |
| `required` | boolean | `false` | Marks the field as required. Shows asterisk and sets aria-required. |
| `disabled` | boolean | `false` | Disables the input. |
| `autocomplete` | string | `` | Autocomplete hint for browser autofill. |

**Slots:** `label` — Optional override for the label content.

**Events:** `input`, `change`

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values. Always use var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)

### `<rr-link>`

Anchor enforcing the design system link style — underlined by default, underline removed on hover.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `href` | string | `` | Link destination. |
| `target` | '_self' \| '_blank' \| '_parent' \| '_top' | `_self` | Browsing context. Use "_blank" to open in a new tab. |
| `rel` | string | `` | rel attribute. Defaults to "noopener noreferrer" when target="_blank" unless overridden. |
| `variant` | 'default' \| 'muted' \| 'subtle' | `default` | Colour variant. Reflected to an attribute. |
| `aria-label` | string \| null | `null` | Accessible label forwarded to the anchor when link text alone is insufficient. |

**Slots:** (default) — Link label content.

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
- Links are underlined by default and lose the underline on hover — do not override this inverted convention

### `<rr-progress>`

Horizontal progress bar with determinate and indeterminate modes, using native role="progressbar".

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `value` | number | `0` | Current value (0–max). Ignored when indeterminate. |
| `max` | number | `100` | Maximum value. |
| `indeterminate` | boolean | `false` | Show an animated indeterminate state instead of a fixed value. Reflected to an attribute. |
| `label` | string | `` | Accessible label, applied as aria-label. Required when no visible label is nearby. |

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
- Always provide a label (or an external visible label) so the progressbar has an accessible name

### `<rr-radio>`

Individual radio button. Must be used inside rr-radio-group, which manages name, value, and selection.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `value` | string | `` | The value this radio contributes to the group when selected. |
| `checked` | boolean | `false` | Visual checked state. Managed by the parent rr-radio-group. |
| `disabled` | boolean | `false` | Disables the radio. |

**Slots:** (default) — Label text.

**Events:** `rr-radio-change`

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
- Always use rr-radio inside an rr-radio-group — selection, name, and form value are managed by the group

### `<rr-radio-group>`

Form-associated group of radio buttons. Renders a fieldset/legend and manages selection and form value for its rr-radio children.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | string | `` | Form field name submitted with the selected value. |
| `value` | string | `` | Selected radio value. Syncs the checked state of child radios. |
| `label` | string | `` | Group label rendered as the legend. |
| `errorText` | string | `` | Error message; sets data-invalid and a custom validity. Maps to attribute error-text. |
| `required` | boolean | `false` | Marks the group as required. |
| `disabled` | boolean | `false` | Disables the group and all child radios. |
| `orientation` | 'vertical' \| 'horizontal' | `vertical` | Layout direction of the radio options. |

**Slots:** (default) — rr-radio child elements.

**Events:** `change`

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
- Place rr-radio elements in the default slot; the group manages their checked state and form value

### `<rr-select>`

Form-associated select dropdown with label, helper text, and error state. Options supplied via the options property.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | string | `` | Form field name submitted with the selected value. |
| `value` | string | `` | Selected option value. |
| `label` | string | `` | Field label rendered above the select. |
| `helperText` | string | `` | Helper text shown when there is no error. Maps to attribute helper-text. |
| `errorText` | string | `` | Error message; sets data-invalid and a custom validity. Maps to attribute error-text. |
| `required` | boolean | `false` | Marks the field as required and shows an asterisk. |
| `disabled` | boolean | `false` | Disables the select. |
| `options` | SelectOption[] | `[]` | Options to render: array of { value: string; label: string; disabled?: boolean }. |

**Events:** `change`

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
- Reuses the shared --component-input-* token set (covers text input, textarea, and select)

### `<rr-skeleton>`

Animated shimmer placeholder for loading states. Text, circular, and rectangular shape variants.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `variant` | 'text' \| 'circular' \| 'rectangular' | `text` | Shape of the skeleton. |
| `width` | string | `` | CSS width value. Defaults to 40px for circular, otherwise 100%. |
| `height` | string | `` | CSS height value. Defaults to 40px for circular, otherwise 1em. |

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
- Decorative placeholder only — the inner element is role=presentation and aria-hidden, so it is excluded from the accessibility tree

### `<rr-spinner>`

Animated circular loading indicator that announces its status to screen readers.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `size` | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' | `md` | Visual size of the spinner. Reflected to the size attribute. |
| `label` | string | `Loading` | Accessible label announced to screen readers via the status region. |

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)

### `<rr-tab>`

A single tab button used inside rr-tab-list; its selection state is managed by the parent.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `value` | string | `` | Unique identifier for this tab; must match the value rr-tab-list uses for selection. Reflected. |
| `selected` | boolean | `false` | Marks the active tab. Set by the parent rr-tab-list — do not set directly. Reflected. |
| `disabled` | boolean | `false` | Prevents selection. Reflected. |

**Slots:** (default) — Tab label text (and optional icon).

**Events:** `rr-tab-select`

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
- Do not set selected directly — control the active tab via rr-tab-list[value].

### `<rr-tab-list>`

Accessible tab strip that wraps rr-tab elements, managing selection and arrow-key navigation.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `label` | string | `` | Accessible label for the tablist (required); sets aria-label on the role=tablist element. |
| `value` | string | `` | Currently selected tab value. Reflected; syncs the matching rr-tab child's selected state. |

**Slots:** (default) — Place rr-tab elements here.

**Events:** `change`

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
- Tab panels are managed by the consuming app — listen for the change event and show/hide content accordingly.

### `<rr-textarea>`

Form-associated multi-line text area with label, helper text, and error state.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | string | `` | Form field name submitted with the form value. |
| `value` | string | `` | Current text value; set as the form value via ElementInternals. |
| `placeholder` | string | `` | Placeholder text shown when empty. |
| `label` | string | `` | Label text; renders a label element when non-empty. |
| `helperText` | string | `` | Helper text shown below the field (attribute: helper-text). Hidden when an error is present. |
| `errorText` | string | `` | Error message (attribute: error-text); when set, marks the field invalid and replaces the helper text. |
| `rows` | number | `3` | Number of visible text rows on the inner textarea. |
| `required` | boolean | `false` | Marks the field required; shows a required indicator. Reflected. |
| `disabled` | boolean | `false` | Disables the field. Reflected. |

**Slots:** `label` — Optional override for the label text.

**Events:** `input`, `change`

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
- Setting error-text marks the field invalid via ElementInternals.setValidity and replaces the helper text.

### `<rr-toggle>`

Form-associated toggle switch for binary on/off settings.

| Attribute | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `checked` | boolean | `false` | On/off state. Reflected. |
| `disabled` | boolean | `false` | Disables the toggle. Reflected. |
| `value` | string | `on` | Form value submitted when the toggle is on. |
| `name` | string | `` | Form field name submitted with the form value. |
| `label` | string | `` | Label text; falls back to slotted content when empty. |

**Slots:** (default) — Label text (alternative to the label property).

**Events:** `change`

**Component rules:**
- Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
- Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
- All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
